Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Question: On day 360, across frames [actual, asset_00, partner_05, partner_09], list every partner value X such that partnered_with(partner=?X, product=product_08, sector=sector_10) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"partner","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b06_partnered_with","args":{"partner":{"var":"X"},"product":{"const":"product_08"},"sector":{"const":"sector_10"}}}}
